creator: hm@hm.net.br
text:
Installing or upgrading fusefs-kmod shows the following option which is enabled by default:

[X]   Automatic global config file setup  

which then adds if not exists fusefs_enable="YES" to rc.conf

that is not a good choice

the option asks for setup, what is one thing

enabling is a totally other thing

I suggest that this behavior get changed, for example making the right question as

[ ] Enabling Fusefs at boot time?

and let it disabled by default
